title: DreamBox Summer Sale!
excerpt: One of the most-asked questions I get about the studio is my DreamBox from Create Room. It has seriously been a game-changer in keeping me organized and getting my creative juices flowing! I’ve done several videos about my DreamBox. Watch…
body:
One of the most-asked questions I get about the studio is my DreamBox from Create Room. It has seriously been a game-changer in keeping me organized and getting my creative juices flowing! I’ve done several videos about my DreamBox. Watch them here and here.

If you’ve been wanting to get a DreamBox for yourself, now is your chance! Create Room is having an amazing Summer Sale from June 26th to July 6th. You can save up to $865!

There are lots of ways to save with these DreamBox discount codes!

  • Use code AMYTANGERINE865 to save $200 off your DreamBox!

  • If you add on Side Tables, a Dream Cart or a Sew Station, you can save an additional 15-20% (or save 15% when purchased alone) with code AMYTANGERINE15.

  • And if you choose the pre-built service, you’ll save another $200!

These offers end on July 6th or while supplies last and Create Room is offering a FREE crafter’s caddy ($35 value) for the first 100 orders!

Click HERE to shop and use your DreamBox discount codes!
